description: Audio assets manifest — voice lines, ambient zones, sound references for prehistoric survival game

voice_lines.label: CraftingWisdom
voice_lines.text: Stone axe, bone needle, fire striker — these are not tools. These are the distance between you and death. Lose them, and the forest wins. Keep them sharp, keep them close.
voice_lines.context: Plays after player crafts their first stone tool — reinforces survival stakes and tool importance

voice_lines.label: EvasionTactics
voice_lines.text: Run. Not from fear — from strategy. A T-Rex sees movement. If you freeze behind cover, you become part of the forest. If you run in the open, you become prey. Choose the moment. Choose the direction. Then move.
voice_lines.context: Plays on first T-Rex encounter — teaches freeze vs run mechanic, core survival decision

voice_lines.label: NightAmbience
voice_lines.text: The valley breathes at night... Stay close to the fire — not for warmth, but for the light. Darkness belongs to them, not to us.
voice_lines.context: Plays at first nightfall — establishes night danger and campfire safety mechanic

voice_lines.label: GroundTremor
voice_lines.text: Listen. The ground speaks before the beast arrives. Feel the tremor through your feet — that rhythm, heavy and slow, means something enormous is moving through the valley. Count the beats...
voice_lines.context: Plays when large dinosaur (T-Rex, Brachiosaurus) approaches within 150m — teaches ground tremor as warning signal

voice_lines.label: ForestReading
voice_lines.text: Insect silence means predator movement. Birds scatter — you have thirty seconds before it reaches you.
voice_lines.context: Teaches ambient silence mechanic — when ambient insects/birds stop, predator is near

ambient_zones.label: AudioZone_Campfire_Hub_001

sounds.name: Campfire On The Shores — night ambience with crickets

ambient_zones.gameplay_note: Safety zone — player fear stat decreases within campfire radius at night

ambient_zones.label: AudioZone_River_Valley_001
ambient_zones.gameplay_note: Water source — player thirst refill zone; Brachiosaurus grazing area

ambient_zones.label: AudioZone_TRex_Danger_001
ambient_zones.gameplay_note: T-Rex territory marker — ambient music shifts to high-tension when player enters; heartbeat SFX activates; EVT_LargeDino_Approaching fires at 150m

ambient_zones.label: AudioZone_NightForest_001

sounds.name: Summer Night With Fireworks — cicadas, owl, forest night

ambient_zones.gameplay_note: Forest edge at night — EVT_NightCycle_Begin fires here; ElderMara TTS-8 triggers

freesound_references.name: Campfire On The Shores — night ambience
freesound_references.use: Night campfire with crickets — ZONE-001 night layer

freesound_references.name: Summer Night — cicadas, owl, forest night

layers.name: base_ambient
layers.description: Always playing — low drone, wind, distant nature

layers.name: tension_1
layers.instruments: low percussion pulse, held breath rhythm

transition_rules: base_ambient → exploration: player moves > 5m from spawn
any → safety: player within campfire radius AND night cycle
any → night_ambient: night cycle begins AND player not in safety zone

next_cycle_priorities: VFX Agent (#17): Screen shake when T-Rex walks nearby (AudioZone_TRex_Danger_001 radius)
VFX Agent (#17): Campfire particle system at AudioZone_Campfire_Hub_001 (2100, 2400, 50)
VFX Agent (#17): Dust particles on player footsteps and dinosaur footfalls
VFX Agent (#17): Damage flash (red screen overlay) when player health drops
Integration (#19): Wire audio event map EVT_* to actual game state triggers in TranspersonalGameState
